backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko backend actor with no logic, serving as a placeholder entry point for the ICP canister.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (CMYK theme, Hero, About, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, used as build planning reference documentation.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used by shadcn-ui components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Sai Ekvira Graphics' and mounting the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections (Navbar, Hero, About, Services, Gallery, WhyChooseUs, Contact, Footer, FloatingWhatsApp) and passes bilingual translations via the useLanguage hook.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About Us section displaying a printer machine image, business description, service highlights checklist, operating hours card, and address card with CMYK-themed styling.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with a validated enquiry form (name, phone, service, message), business info cards, and a Google Maps embed, supporting bilingual translations.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: Fixed bottom-right floating button linking to the business WhatsApp number, featuring the WhatsApp SVG icon and a hover scale animation.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, social links (Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp), quick navigation links, and contact details, using translations passed via props.
frontend/src/components/Gallery.tsx: Displays a responsive image grid of print work samples with hover overlays and a lightbox with prev/next navigation for full-size viewing.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, CMYK accent stripes, business name, tagline, CTA buttons (call, WhatsApp, get quote), and a stats bar.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, a language toggle button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu that becomes opaque on scroll.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Renders a 4-column grid of eight printing services (flex banners, digital printing, visiting cards, etc.) with color-coded cards and bilingual names using translation props.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: React section component displaying a 6-feature grid explaining why customers should choose Sai Ekvira Graphics, with CMYK-themed icons and bilingual (English/Hindi) support via translations prop.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider for ICP, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useLanguage.ts: Defines the Translations interface and provides English and Hindi translation objects, along with a useLanguage hook for toggling between the two languages.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module indicating no backend queries are needed for this static business website; exports nothing.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines CMYK-inspired CSS custom properties, and adds utility classes for brand colors, typography, and buttons.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom brand colors (navy, CMYK-inspired), fonts (Montserrat/Open Sans), shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, plus typography and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 3) for the 'Sai Ekvira Graphics' business website, including architectural notes, color scheme, business details, image requirements, and a list of existing implemented features.
